### ========================================--- FILE: D:\Học tập\Lập Trình Quản Lý\Do-An_Giai-Doan-10\TaskFlowManagement\TaskFlowManagement.WinForms\Forms\frmProjectEdit.cs ---
using TaskFlowManagement.Core.Entities;
using TaskFlowManagement.Core.Interfaces;
using TaskFlowManagement.Core.Interfaces.Services;
using TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.Common;

namespace TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.Forms
{
    public partial class frmProjectEdit : BaseForm
    {
        // â”€â”€ Dependencies â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        private readonly IProjectService _projectService;
        private readonly IUserService _userService;
        private readonly ICustomerRepository _customerRepo;
        private readonly Project? _editProject;
        private readonly bool _isEdit;

        // â”€â”€ State â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        private List<Customer> _customers = new();
        private List<User> _managers = new();

        [Obsolete("Chá»‰ dÃ¹ng cho WinForms Designer")]
        public frmProjectEdit()
        {
            InitializeComponent();
        }

        public frmProjectEdit(
            IProjectService projectService,
            IUserService userService,
            ICustomerRepository customerRepo,
            Project? editProject)
        {
            _projectService = projectService;
            _userService = userService;
            _customerRepo = customerRepo;
            _editProject = editProject;
            _isEdit = editProject != null;

            InitializeComponent();
            ApplyClientStyles();
        }

        // â”€â”€ Khá»Ÿi táº¡o giao diá»‡n â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private void ApplyClientStyles()
        {
            // Header
            panelHeader.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorHeaderBg;
            panelAccentLine.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorPrimary;
            lblTitleForm.ForeColor = UIHelper.ColorSurface;

            // Body
            panelBody.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorBackground;
            tableFields.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorBackground;
            tableDateTime.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorBackground;
            tableBudgetPriority.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorBackground;
            panelStart.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorBackground;
            panelDeadline.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorBackground;
            panelDeadlineInput.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorBackground;
            panelBudget.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorBackground;
            panelPriority.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorBackground;

            // Labels
            var allLabels = new[]
            {
                lblName, lblCustomer, lblOwner,
                lblStart, lblDeadline, lblBudget, lblPriority, lblDesc
            };
            foreach (var lbl in allLabels)
            {
                lbl.Font = new System.Drawing.Font("Segoe UI", 8F, System.Drawing.FontStyle.Bold);
                lbl.ForeColor = UIHelper.ColorMuted;
            }

            lblName.Text = "TÃŠN Dá»° ÃN *";
            lblCustomer.Text = "KHÃCH HÃ€NG";
            lblOwner.Text = "QUáº¢N LÃ Dá»° ÃN (PM) *";
            lblStart.Text = "NGÃ€Y Báº®T Äáº¦U";
            lblDeadline.Text = "DEADLINE";
            lblBudget.Text = "NGÃ‚N SÃCH (VNÄ)";
            lblPriority.Text = "Äá»˜ Æ¯U TIÃŠN";
            lblDesc.Text = "MÃ” Táº¢ (tÃ¹y chá»n)";

            // TextBoxes & inputs
            var allInputs = new Control[] { txtName, txtBudget, txtDescription };
            foreach (var ctrl in allInputs)
            {
                ctrl.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorSurface;
                ctrl.ForeColor = UIHelper.ColorTextPrimary;
                ctrl.Font = UIHelper.FontBase;
            }

            var allCombos = new[] { cboCustomer, cboOwner, cboPriority };
            foreach (var cbo in allCombos)
            {
                cbo.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorSurface;
                cbo.ForeColor = UIHelper.ColorTextPrimary;
                cbo.Font = UIHelper.FontBase;
            }

            chkDeadline.Font = UIHelper.FontSmall;
            chkDeadline.ForeColor = UIHelper.ColorMuted;

            dtpStartDate.Font = UIHelper.FontBase;
            dtpDeadline.Font = UIHelper.FontBase;

            // Footer
            panelFooter.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorSurface;
            panelFooterLine.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorBorderLight;
            flowButtons.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorSurface;
            lblError.Font = UIHelper.FontSmall;
            lblError.ForeColor = UIHelper.ColorDanger;

            UIHelper.StyleButton(btnSave, UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Primary);
            UIHelper.StyleButton(btnCancel, UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Secondary);
        }

        // â”€â”€ Form Load â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        protected override async void OnLoad(EventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnLoad(e);
            await LoadDropdownsAsync();
            if (_isEdit) LoadEditData();
        }

        // â”€â”€ Data Loading â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private async Task LoadDropdownsAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                cboCustomer.DataSource = null; cboCustomer.Items.Clear();
                cboOwner.DataSource = null; cboOwner.Items.Clear();
                cboPriority.DataSource = null; cboPriority.Items.Clear();

                _customers = await _customerRepo.GetAllAsync();
                cboCustomer.Items.Add("â€” KhÃ´ng chá»n â€”");
                foreach (var c in _customers)
                    cboCustomer.Items.Add(c.CompanyName);
                cboCustomer.SelectedIndex = 0;

                var allUsers = await _userService.GetAllUsersAsync();
                _managers = allUsers.Where(u =>
                    u.IsActive &&
                    u.UserRoles.Any(r => r.Role?.Name == "Manager" || r.Role?.Name == "Admin"))
                    .ToList();

                foreach (var m in _managers)
                    cboOwner.Items.Add(m.FullName);
                if (cboOwner.Items.Count > 0) cboOwner.SelectedIndex = 0;

                cboPriority.Items.AddRange(new object[] { "Low", "Medium", "High", "Critical" });
                cboPriority.SelectedIndex = 1;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                lblError.Text = "âš   Lá»—i táº£i dá»¯ liá»‡u: " + (ex.InnerException?.Message ?? ex.Message);
            }
        }

        private void LoadEditData()
        {
            this.Text = "Sá»­a thÃ´ng tin dá»± Ã¡n";
            lblTitleForm.Text = "âœï¸  Sá»­a thÃ´ng tin dá»± Ã¡n";

            txtName.Text = _editProject!.Name;
            txtDescription.Text = _editProject.Description ?? "";
            dtpStartDate.Value = _editProject.StartDate.ToDateTime(TimeOnly.MinValue);

            if (_editProject.PlannedEndDate.HasValue)
            {
                chkDeadline.Checked = true;
                dtpDeadline.Value = _editProject.PlannedEndDate.Value.ToDateTime(TimeOnly.MinValue);
            }

            txtBudget.Text = _editProject.Budget > 0 ? _editProject.Budget.ToString("0") : "";

            if (_editProject.CustomerId.HasValue)
            {
                var idx = _customers.FindIndex(c => c.Id == _editProject.CustomerId);
                cboCustomer.SelectedIndex = idx >= 0 ? idx + 1 : 0;
            }

            var ownerIdx = _managers.FindIndex(m => m.Id == _editProject.OwnerId);
            if (ownerIdx >= 0) cboOwner.SelectedIndex = ownerIdx;

            cboPriority.SelectedIndex = Math.Max(0, _editProject.Priority - 1);
        }

        // â”€â”€ Event Handlers â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private async void btnSave_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            lblError.Text = "";

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(txtName.Text))
            {
                lblError.Text = "âš   TÃªn dá»± Ã¡n khÃ´ng Ä‘Æ°á»£c Ä‘á»ƒ trá»‘ng.";
                txtName.Focus();
                return;
            }

            if (cboOwner.SelectedIndex < 0)
            {
                lblError.Text = "âš   Vui lÃ²ng chá»n ngÆ°á»i quáº£n lÃ½.";
                return;
            }

            if (chkDeadline.Checked && dtpDeadline.Value.Date <= dtpStartDate.Value.Date)
            {
                lblError.Text = "âš   Deadline pháº£i sau ngÃ y báº¯t Ä‘áº§u.";
                dtpDeadline.Focus();
                return;
            }

            SetLoading(true);
            try
            {
                int? customerId = cboCustomer.SelectedIndex > 0
                    ? _customers[cboCustomer.SelectedIndex - 1].Id
                    : null;

                int ownerId = _managers[cboOwner.SelectedIndex].Id;

                decimal budget = 0;
                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(txtBudget.Text))
                    decimal.TryParse(
                        txtBudget.Text.Replace(",", "").Replace(".", ""),
                        out budget);

                DateOnly? deadline = chkDeadline.Checked
                    ? DateOnly.FromDateTime(dtpDeadline.Value)
                    : null;

                if (_isEdit)
                {
                    _editProject!.Name = txtName.Text.Trim();
                    _editProject.Description = NullIfEmpty(txtDescription.Text);
                    _editProject.CustomerId = customerId;
                    _editProject.OwnerId = ownerId;
                    _editProject.StartDate = DateOnly.FromDateTime(dtpStartDate.Value);
                    _editProject.PlannedEndDate = deadline;
                    _editProject.Budget = budget;
                    _editProject.Priority = (byte)(cboPriority.SelectedIndex + 1);

                    var (ok, msg) = await _projectService.UpdateProjectAsync(_editProject);
                    if (ok) { this.DialogResult = DialogResult.OK; this.Close(); }
                    else lblError.Text = "âš   " + msg;
                }
                else
                {
                    var project = new Project
                    {
                        Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                        Description = NullIfEmpty(txtDescription.Text),
                        CustomerId = customerId,
                        OwnerId = ownerId,
                        StartDate = DateOnly.FromDateTime(dtpStartDate.Value),
                        PlannedEndDate = deadline,
                        Budget = budget,
                        Priority = (byte)(cboPriority.SelectedIndex + 1),
                        Status = "NotStarted"
                    };

                    var (ok, msg) = await _projectService.CreateProjectAsync(project);
                    if (ok) { this.DialogResult = DialogResult.OK; this.Close(); }
                    else lblError.Text = "âš   " + msg;
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                lblError.Text = "âš   Lá»—i: " + (ex.InnerException?.Message ?? ex.Message);
            }
            finally
            {
                if (!this.IsDisposed) SetLoading(false);
            }
        }

        private void btnCancel_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            this.DialogResult = DialogResult.Cancel;
            this.Close();
        }

        private void chkDeadline_CheckedChanged(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            dtpDeadline.Enabled = chkDeadline.Checked;
        }

        // â”€â”€ Helpers â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private void SetLoading(bool loading)
        {
            btnSave.Enabled = !loading;
            btnSave.Text = loading ? "â³  Äang lÆ°u..." : "ðŸ’¾  LÆ°u dá»± Ã¡n";
        }

        private static string? NullIfEmpty(string? s)
            => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s) ? null : s.Trim();
    }
}

### ========================================--- FILE: D:\Học tập\Lập Trình Quản Lý\Do-An_Giai-Doan-10\TaskFlowManagement\TaskFlowManagement.WinForms\Forms\frmProjectMembers.cs ---
using TaskFlowManagement.Core.Entities;
using TaskFlowManagement.Core.Interfaces.Services;
using TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.Common;

namespace TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.Forms
{
    public partial class frmProjectMembers : BaseForm
    {
        // â”€â”€ Dependencies â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        private readonly IProjectService _projectService;
        private readonly IUserService _userService;
        private readonly Project _project;

        // â”€â”€ State â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        private List<ProjectMember> _members = new();
        private List<User> _availableUsers = new();

        [Obsolete("Chá»‰ dÃ¹ng cho WinForms Designer")]
        public frmProjectMembers()
        {
            InitializeComponent();
        }

        public frmProjectMembers(
            IProjectService projectService,
            IUserService userService,
            Project project)
        {
            _projectService = projectService;
            _userService = userService;
            _project = project;

            InitializeComponent();
            ApplyClientStyles();

            var title = $"ðŸ‘¥  ThÃ nh viÃªn â€” {_project.Name}";
            this.Text = title;
            lblTitle.Text = title;

            bool canEdit = AppSession.IsManager;
            panelAdd.Visible = canEdit;
            btnRemove.Visible = canEdit;
        }

        // â”€â”€ Khá»Ÿi táº¡o giao diá»‡n â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private void ApplyClientStyles()
        {
            // Header
            panelHeader.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorHeaderBg;
            panelAccent.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorPrimary;
            lblTitle.Font = UIHelper.FontHeaderLarge;
            lblTitle.ForeColor = UIHelper.ColorHeaderFg;

            // Khu vá»±c thÃªm thÃ nh viÃªn
            panelAdd.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorBackground;
            tableAdd.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorBackground;
            lblAddTitle.Font = new System.Drawing.Font("Segoe UI", 8F, System.Drawing.FontStyle.Bold);
            lblAddTitle.ForeColor = UIHelper.ColorMuted;

            cboUser.Font = UIHelper.FontBase;
            cboUser.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorSurface;
            cboProjectRole.Font = UIHelper.FontBase;
            cboProjectRole.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorSurface;

            UIHelper.StyleButton(btnAddMember, UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Primary);

            // DataGridView
            UIHelper.StyleDataGridView(dgvMembers);
            UIHelper.ApplyAlternateRowColors(dgvMembers);

            colJoinedAt.DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter;

            // Footer
            panelBottom.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorSurface;
            panelBottomLine.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorBorderLight;
            flowBottomBtns.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorSurface;
            lblCount.Font = UIHelper.FontSmall;
            lblCount.ForeColor = UIHelper.ColorMuted;

            UIHelper.StyleButton(btnRemove, UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Danger);
            UIHelper.StyleButton(btnClose, UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Secondary);
        }

        // â”€â”€ Form Load â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        protected override async void OnLoad(EventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnLoad(e);
            await LoadMembersAsync();
            await LoadAvailableUsersAsync();

            cboProjectRole.Items.AddRange(new object[] { "Developer", "Tester", "BA", "Tech Lead" });
            cboProjectRole.SelectedIndex = 0;
        }

        // â”€â”€ Data Loading â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private async Task LoadMembersAsync()
        {
            _members = await _projectService.GetMembersAsync(_project.Id);
            dgvMembers.Rows.Clear();

            foreach (var m in _members)
            {
                dgvMembers.Rows.Add(
                    m.UserId,
                    m.User?.FullName ?? "â€”",
                    m.User?.Email ?? "â€”",
                    m.ProjectRole ?? "â€”",
                    m.JoinedAt.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd/MM/yyyy"));
            }

            lblCount.Text = $"{_members.Count} thÃ nh viÃªn";
        }

        private async Task LoadAvailableUsersAsync()
        {
            var allActive = await _userService.GetAllActiveUsersAsync();
            var memberIds = _members.Select(m => m.UserId).ToHashSet();
            _availableUsers = allActive.Where(u => !memberIds.Contains(u.Id)).ToList();

            cboUser.Items.Clear();
            foreach (var u in _availableUsers)
                cboUser.Items.Add($"{u.FullName}  ({u.Username})");

            if (cboUser.Items.Count > 0) cboUser.SelectedIndex = 0;

            cboUser.AdjustDropDownWidth();
        }

        // â”€â”€ Event Handlers â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private async void btnAddMember_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (cboUser.SelectedIndex < 0)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(
                    "Vui lÃ²ng chá»n ngÆ°á»i dÃ¹ng.",
                    "ThÃ´ng bÃ¡o", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
                return;
            }

            btnAddMember.Enabled = false;
            try
            {
                var user = _availableUsers[cboUser.SelectedIndex];
                var role = cboProjectRole.SelectedItem?.ToString() ?? "Developer";

                var (ok, msg) = await _projectService.AddMemberAsync(_project.Id, user.Id, role);
                if (ok)
                {
                    await LoadMembersAsync();
                    await LoadAvailableUsersAsync();
                }
                else
                {
                    MessageBox.Show(msg, "Lá»—i", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                if (!this.IsDisposed) btnAddMember.Enabled = true;
            }
        }

        private async void btnRemove_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (dgvMembers.SelectedRows.Count == 0) return;

            int userId = (int)dgvMembers.SelectedRows[0].Cells["colMemberId"].Value;
            var member = _members.FirstOrDefault(m => m.UserId == userId);
            if (member == null) return;

            if (MessageBox.Show(
                    $"XÃ³a \"{member.User?.FullName}\" khá»i dá»± Ã¡n?\n\nLá»‹ch sá»­ tham gia váº«n Ä‘Æ°á»£c lÆ°u láº¡i.",
                    "XÃ¡c nháº­n", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Question) != DialogResult.Yes)
                return;

            btnRemove.Enabled = false;
            try
            {
                var (ok, _) = await _projectService.RemoveMemberAsync(_project.Id, userId);
                if (ok)
                {
                    await LoadMembersAsync();
                    await LoadAvailableUsersAsync();
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                if (!this.IsDisposed) btnRemove.Enabled = true;
            }
        }

        private void btnClose_Click(object sender, EventArgs e) => this.Close();
    }
}


### ========================================--- FILE: D:\Học tập\Lập Trình Quản Lý\Do-An_Giai-Doan-10\TaskFlowManagement\TaskFlowManagement.WinForms\Forms\frmProjectMembers.Designer.cs ---

            base.Dispose(disposing);
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {

            lblTitle = new Label();

            cboProjectRole = new ComboBox();
            btnAddMember = new Button();
            panelBottom = new Panel();
            flowBottomBtns = new FlowLayoutPanel();
            btnClose = new Button();
            btnRemove = new Button();

            panelBottomLine = new Panel();

            ((System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize)dgvMembers).BeginInit();
            panelAdd.SuspendLayout();
            tableAdd.SuspendLayout();
            panelBottom.SuspendLayout();
            flowBottomBtns.SuspendLayout();
            SuspendLayout();
            // 
            // panelHeader
            //

            lblTitle.Padding = new Padding(21, 0, 0, 0);
            lblTitle.Size = new Size(663, 72);
            lblTitle.TabIndex = 0;
            lblTitle.Text = "ðŸ‘¥  ThÃ nh viÃªn dá»± Ã¡n";
            lblTitle.TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft;
            // 
            // panelAccent
            // 
            panelAccent.Dock = DockStyle.Bottom;
            panelAccent.Location = new Point(0, 72);
            panelAccent.Margin = new Padding(3, 4, 3, 4);

using TaskFlowManagement.Core.Entities;
using TaskFlowManagement.Core.Interfaces;
using TaskFlowManagement.Core.Interfaces.Services;
using TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.Common;

namespace TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.Forms
{
    public partial class frmProjects : BaseForm
    {
        // â”€â”€ Dependencies â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        private readonly IProjectService _projectService;
        private readonly IUserService _userService;
        private readonly ITaskService _taskService;
        private readonly ICustomerRepository _customerRepo;

        // â”€â”€ State â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        private List<Project> _allProjects = new();
        private Project? _selectedProject;

        [Obsolete("Chá»‰ dÃ¹ng cho WinForms Designer")]
        public frmProjects()
        {
            InitializeComponent();
        }

        public frmProjects(
            IProjectService projectService,
            IUserService userService,
            ITaskService taskService,
            ICustomerRepository customerRepo)
        {
            _projectService = projectService;
            _userService = userService;
            _taskService = taskService;
            _customerRepo = customerRepo;

            InitializeComponent();
            ApplyClientStyles();
            SetupPermissions();
        }

        // â”€â”€ Khá»Ÿi táº¡o giao diá»‡n â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private void ApplyClientStyles()
        {
            // Header
            panelTop.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorHeaderBg;
            lblHeader.Font = UIHelper.FontHeaderLarge;
            lblHeader.ForeColor = UIHelper.ColorHeaderFg;

            // Toolbar â€” ná»n nháº¡t, chá»©a cáº£ search láº«n action buttons
            panelToolbar.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorBackground;

            txtSearch.Font = UIHelper.FontSmall;

            UIHelper.StyleFilterCombo(cboFilterStatus);
            cboFilterStatus.Items.Clear();
            cboFilterStatus.Items.AddRange(new object[]
            {
                "â€” Táº¥t cáº£ tráº¡ng thÃ¡i â€”",
                "NotStarted", "InProgress", "OnHold", "Completed", "Cancelled"
            });
            cboFilterStatus.SelectedIndex = 0;

            UIHelper.StyleButton(btnRefresh, UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Secondary);

            // NhÃ³m nÃºt chá»©c nÄƒng
            UIHelper.StyleButton(btnAdd, UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Primary);
            UIHelper.StyleButton(btnEdit, UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Success);
            UIHelper.StyleButton(btnDelete, UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Danger);
            UIHelper.StyleButton(btnStatus, UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Warning);
            UIHelper.StyleButton(btnMembers, UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Purple);
            UIHelper.StyleButton(btnDetail, UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Slate);
            UIHelper.StyleButton(btnKanban, UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Info);

            // DataGridView
            UIHelper.StyleDataGridView(dgvProjects);
            UIHelper.ApplyAlternateRowColors(dgvProjects);

            colMembers.DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter;
            colDeadline.DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter;
            colStartDate.DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter;
            colBudget.DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleRight;

            // Status bar
            panelStatus.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorHeaderBg;
            lblStatus.Font = UIHelper.FontSmall;
            lblStatus.ForeColor = UIHelper.ColorSubtitle;
        }

        // â”€â”€ Permissions â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private void SetupPermissions()
        {
            bool canEdit = AppSession.IsManager;
            btnAdd.Visible = canEdit;
            btnEdit.Visible = canEdit;
            btnDelete.Visible = canEdit;
            btnStatus.Visible = canEdit;
        }

        // â”€â”€ Form Load â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        protected override async void OnLoad(EventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnLoad(e);
            await LoadProjectsAsync();
        }

        // â”€â”€ Data Loading â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private async Task LoadProjectsAsync()
        {
            SetStatus("â³ Äang táº£i...");
            try
            {
                _allProjects = await _projectService.GetProjectsForUserAsync(
                    AppSession.UserId, AppSession.IsManager);

                for (int i = 0; i < _allProjects.Count; i++)
                {
                    var detail = await _projectService.GetProjectDetailsAsync(_allProjects[i].Id);
                    if (detail != null) _allProjects[i] = detail;
                }

                ApplyFilter();
                SetStatus($"âœ… Tá»•ng: {_allProjects.Count} dá»± Ã¡n");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                SetStatus("âš  Lá»—i táº£i dá»¯ liá»‡u.");
                MessageBox.Show(
                    $"KhÃ´ng thá»ƒ táº£i danh sÃ¡ch dá»± Ã¡n:\n{ex.Message}",
                    "Lá»—i", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        // â”€â”€ Filter / Bind â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private void ApplyFilter()
        {
            var keyword = txtSearch.Text.Trim().ToLowerInvariant();
            var statusFilter = cboFilterStatus.SelectedIndex > 0
                ? cboFilterStatus.SelectedItem!.ToString()!
                : string.Empty;

            var filtered = _allProjects.Where(p =>
            {
                bool matchKeyword = string.IsNullOrEmpty(keyword)
                    || p.Name.ToLowerInvariant().Contains(keyword)
                    || (p.Customer?.CompanyName?.ToLowerInvariant().Contains(keyword) ?? false)
                    || (p.Owner?.FullName?.ToLowerInvariant().Contains(keyword) ?? false);

                bool matchStatus = string.IsNullOrEmpty(statusFilter)
                    || p.Status == statusFilter;

                return matchKeyword && matchStatus;
            }).ToList();

            BindGrid(filtered);
        }

        private void BindGrid(List<Project> projects)
        {
            dgvProjects.Rows.Clear();

            foreach (var p in projects)
            {
                var statusText = UIHelper.FormatProjectStatus(p.Status);
                var deadline = p.PlannedEndDate.HasValue
                    ? p.PlannedEndDate.Value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy") : "â€”";
                var budget = p.Budget > 0 ? p.Budget.ToString("N0") + " â‚«" : "â€”";
                var memberCount = p.Members?.Count(m => m.LeftAt == null) ?? 0;

                int idx = dgvProjects.Rows.Add(
                    p.Id, p.Name,
                    p.Customer?.CompanyName ?? "â€”",
                    p.Owner?.FullName ?? "â€”",
                    statusText,
                    $"{memberCount} ngÆ°á»i",
                    deadline, budget,
                    p.StartDate.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy"));

                UIHelper.ApplyProjectRowStyle(dgvProjects.Rows[idx], p.Status, p.PlannedEndDate);
            }

            SetStatus($"âœ… Tá»•ng: {projects.Count} dá»± Ã¡n");
        }

        // â”€â”€ Selection â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private void dgvProjects_SelectionChanged(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (dgvProjects.SelectedRows.Count == 0)
            {
                _selectedProject = null;
                UpdateButtons();
                return;
            }

            int id = (int)dgvProjects.SelectedRows[0].Cells["colId"].Value;
            _selectedProject = _allProjects.FirstOrDefault(p => p.Id == id);
            UpdateButtons();
        }

        private void UpdateButtons()
        {
            bool sel = _selectedProject != null;
            btnEdit.Enabled = sel;
            btnDelete.Enabled = sel;
            btnMembers.Enabled = sel;
            btnStatus.Enabled = sel;
            btnDetail.Enabled = sel;
            btnKanban.Enabled = sel;
        }

        // â”€â”€ CRUD Actions â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private async void btnAdd_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            using var dlg = new frmProjectEdit(_projectService, _userService, _customerRepo, null);
            if (dlg.ShowDialog(this) == DialogResult.OK)
                await LoadProjectsAsync();
        }

        private async void btnEdit_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_selectedProject == null) return;
            var detail = await _projectService.GetProjectDetailsAsync(_selectedProject.Id);
            if (detail == null) return;

            using var dlg = new frmProjectEdit(_projectService, _userService, _customerRepo, detail);
            if (dlg.ShowDialog(this) == DialogResult.OK)
                await LoadProjectsAsync();
        }

        private async void btnDelete_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_selectedProject == null) return;
            if (MessageBox.Show(
                    $"XÃ³a dá»± Ã¡n \"{_selectedProject.Name}\"?\n\nChá»‰ xÃ³a Ä‘Æ°á»£c náº¿u dá»± Ã¡n chÆ°a cÃ³ cÃ´ng viá»‡c nÃ o.",
                    "XÃ¡c nháº­n xÃ³a",
                    MessageBoxButtons.YesNo,
                    MessageBoxIcon.Warning) != DialogResult.Yes) return;

            btnDelete.Enabled = false;
            try
            {
                var (ok, msg) = await _projectService.DeleteProjectAsync(_selectedProject.Id);
                MessageBox.Show(msg,
                    ok ? "ThÃ nh cÃ´ng" : "KhÃ´ng thá»ƒ xÃ³a",
                    MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                    ok ? MessageBoxIcon.Information : MessageBoxIcon.Error);

                if (ok) await LoadProjectsAsync();
            }
            finally
            {
                btnDelete.Enabled = true;
            }
        }

        // â”€â”€ Status Change â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private ContextMenuStrip? _statusMenu;

        private async void btnStatus_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_selectedProject == null) return;

            btnStatus.Enabled = false;
            try
            {
                _statusMenu?.Dispose();
                _statusMenu = new ContextMenuStrip();
                var menu = _statusMenu;
                var statuses = new[] { "NotStarted", "InProgress", "OnHold", "Completed", "Cancelled" };

                foreach (var s in statuses)
                {
                    var status = s;
                    var item = menu.Items.Add(UIHelper.FormatProjectStatus(status));
                    item.Click += async (_, _) =>
                    {
                        var (ok, msg) = await _projectService.ChangeStatusAsync(_selectedProject.Id, status);
                        if (ok) await LoadProjectsAsync();
                        else MessageBox.Show(msg, "Lá»—i", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                    };
                }

                menu.Show(btnStatus, new Point(0, btnStatus.Height));
            }
            finally
            {
                btnStatus.Enabled = true;
            }
        }

        // â”€â”€ Members â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private async void btnMembers_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_selectedProject == null) return;
            using var dlg = new frmProjectMembers(_projectService, _userService, _selectedProject);
            dlg.ShowDialog(this);
            await LoadProjectsAsync();
        }

        // â”€â”€ Kanban â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private void btnKanban_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_selectedProject == null)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(
                    "Vui lÃ²ng chá»n má»™t dá»± Ã¡n Ä‘á»ƒ xem Kanban Board.",
                    "ChÆ°a chá»n dá»± Ã¡n", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                return;
            }

            using var dlg = new frmKanban(_taskService, _projectService, _userService, _selectedProject.Id);
            dlg.ShowDialog(this);
        }

        // â”€â”€ Detail â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private async void btnDetail_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_selectedProject == null) return;
            var detail = await _projectService.GetProjectDetailsAsync(_selectedProject.Id);
            if (detail == null)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("KhÃ´ng tÃ¬m tháº¥y dá»± Ã¡n.", "Lá»—i");
                return;
            }

            var memberCount = detail.Members?.Count(m => m.LeftAt == null) ?? 0;
            var taskCount = detail.Tasks?.Count ?? 0;
            var totalExpense = detail.Expenses?.Sum(ex => ex.Amount) ?? 0;

            var memberList = detail.Members?
                .Where(m => m.LeftAt == null)
                .Select(m => $"  ðŸ‘¤ {m.User?.FullName ?? "?"} â€” {m.ProjectRole ?? "Developer"}")
                .ToList() ?? new();

            var info =
                $"ðŸ“  {detail.Name}\n" +
                $"â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”\n\n" +
                $"KhÃ¡ch hÃ ng:    {detail.Customer?.CompanyName ?? "â€”"}\n" +
                $"Quáº£n lÃ½:       {detail.Owner?.FullName ?? "â€”"}\n" +
                $"Tráº¡ng thÃ¡i:    {UIHelper.FormatProjectStatus(detail.Status)}\n" +
                $"NgÃ y báº¯t Ä‘áº§u:  {detail.StartDate:dd/MM/yyyy}\n" +
                $"Deadline:      {(detail.PlannedEndDate.HasValue ? detail.PlannedEndDate.Value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy") : "â€”")}\n" +
                $"NgÃ¢n sÃ¡ch:     {detail.Budget:N0} â‚«\n" +
                $"Chi phÃ­ thá»±c:  {totalExpense:N0} â‚«\n" +
                $"Tiáº¿n Ä‘á»™:       {detail.ProgressPercent}%\n\n" +
                $"â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”\n" +
                $"ðŸ‘¥  ThÃ nh viÃªn ({memberCount})\n" +
                (memberList.Count > 0 ? string.Join("\n", memberList) : "  ChÆ°a cÃ³ thÃ nh viÃªn") +
                $"\n\nðŸ“‹  CÃ´ng viá»‡c: {taskCount} task";

            MessageBox.Show(info, "Chi tiáº¿t dá»± Ã¡n", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
        }

        // â”€â”€ Filter & Refresh Events â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private void txtSearch_TextChanged(object sender, EventArgs e) => ApplyFilter();
        private void cboFilterStatus_SelectedIndexChanged(object sender, EventArgs e) => ApplyFilter();
        private async void btnRefresh_Click(object sender, EventArgs e) => await LoadProjectsAsync();

        private void dgvProjects_CellDoubleClick(object sender, DataGridViewCellEventArgs e)
        {
            if (e.RowIndex < 0) return;
            if (AppSession.IsManager) btnEdit_Click(sender, e);
            else btnDetail_Click(sender, e);
        }

        // â”€â”€ Status Bar â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private void SetStatus(string msg) => lblStatus.Text = msg;
    }
}

### ========================================--- FILE: D:\Học tập\Lập Trình Quản Lý\Do-An_Giai-Doan-10\TaskFlowManagement\TaskFlowManagement.WinForms\Forms\frmReportViewer.cs ---
using Microsoft.Reporting.WinForms;
using TaskFlowManagement.Core.Interfaces.Services;
using TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.Common;

namespace TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.Forms
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Form hiá»ƒn thá»‹ bÃ¡o cÃ¡o chi phÃ­ vÃ  ngÃ¢n sÃ¡ch dá»± Ã¡n (GÄ9 â€“ UC-Report-01).
    ///
    /// TÃ­ch há»£p Microsoft.Reporting.WinForms (ReportViewer control).
    /// Package NuGet cáº§n thÃªm vÃ o TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.csproj:
    ///   Microsoft.Reporting.WinForms (v15.x hoáº·c má»›i nháº¥t há»— trá»£ .NET 8 WinForms)
    ///
    /// Luá»“ng hoáº¡t Ä‘á»™ng:
    ///   1. frmExpenses má»Ÿ frmReportViewer, truyá»n vÃ o projectId (null = táº¥t cáº£).
    ///   2. Form_Load â†’ await GetExpenseReportDataAsync() vá»›i WaitCursor.
    ///   3. Táº¡o ReportDataSource tá»« List&lt;ExpenseReportDto&gt;.
    ///   4. Truyá»n Parameter pReporter vÃ  pExportDate vÃ o RDLC.
    ///   5. ReportViewer.RefreshReport() â†’ render PDF/Excel/Word ná»™i tuyáº¿n.
    /// </summary>
    public partial class frmReportViewer : Form
    {
        // â”€â”€ Dependencies â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        private readonly IExpenseService _expenseService;

        // â”€â”€ Tham sá»‘ Ä‘áº§u vÃ o â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        /// <summary>
        /// null = bÃ¡o cÃ¡o tá»•ng há»£p táº¥t cáº£ dá»± Ã¡n.
        /// CÃ³ giÃ¡ trá»‹ = bÃ¡o cÃ¡o cho dá»± Ã¡n cá»¥ thá»ƒ.
        /// </summary>
        private readonly int? _projectId;

        // â”€â”€ TÃªn RDLC (embedded resource) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        private const string RDLC_NAME = "TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.Reports.ProjectExpenseReport.rdlc";

        // â”€â”€ TÃªn DataSet trong RDLC â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        private const string DATASET_NAME = "dsExpenseReport";

        // â”€â”€ Constructor â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        /// <summary>
        /// Khá»Ÿi táº¡o ReportViewer form.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="expenseService">Service láº¥y dá»¯ liá»‡u bÃ¡o cÃ¡o (qua DI).</param>
        /// <param name="projectId">
        ///   null  â†’ bÃ¡o cÃ¡o tá»•ng há»£p táº¥t cáº£ dá»± Ã¡n.
        ///   int   â†’ bÃ¡o cÃ¡o cá»§a má»™t dá»± Ã¡n cá»¥ thá»ƒ.
        /// </param>
        public frmReportViewer(IExpenseService expenseService, int? projectId = null)
        {
            _expenseService = expenseService;
            _projectId      = projectId;

            InitializeComponent();
            SetupFormStyle();
        }

        // â”€â”€ UI Setup â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private void SetupFormStyle()
        {
            this.Text            = "ðŸ“Š BÃ¡o cÃ¡o Chi phÃ­ & NgÃ¢n sÃ¡ch Dá»± Ã¡n â€“ TaskFlow Management";
            this.BackColor       = UIHelper.ColorBackground;
            this.MinimumSize     = new Size(1000, 700);
            this.StartPosition   = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            this.WindowState     = FormWindowState.Maximized;
        }

        // â”€â”€ Sá»± kiá»‡n Form Load â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private async void frmReportViewer_Load(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            await LoadReportAsync();
        }

        // â”€â”€ Logic Náº¡p vÃ  Render BÃ¡o CÃ¡o â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        /// <summary>
        /// Náº¡p dá»¯ liá»‡u báº¥t Ä‘á»“ng bá»™, táº¡o DataSource vÃ  render RDLC.
        /// Äá»•i con trá» chuá»™t sang WaitCursor khi Ä‘ang táº£i Ä‘á»ƒ bÃ¡o hiá»‡u UI Ä‘ang báº­n.
        /// </summary>
        private async Task LoadReportAsync()
        {
            // 1. Chuyá»ƒn sang WaitCursor â€“ ngÄƒn user click linh tinh khi Ä‘ang load
            this.Cursor   = Cursors.WaitCursor;
            lblStatus.Text = "â³ Äang táº£i dá»¯ liá»‡u bÃ¡o cÃ¡o...";
            lblStatus.Visible = true;

            try
            {
                // 2. Láº¥y dá»¯ liá»‡u báº¥t Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ tá»« Service â†’ Repository â†’ DB
                var reportData = await _expenseService.GetExpenseReportDataAsync(_projectId);

                if (reportData.Count == 0)
                {
                    lblStatus.Text = "â„¹ï¸ KhÃ´ng cÃ³ dá»¯ liá»‡u Ä‘á»ƒ hiá»ƒn thá»‹ bÃ¡o cÃ¡o.";
                    return;
                }

                lblStatus.Visible = false;

                // 3. Cáº¥u hÃ¬nh ReportViewer â€“ dÃ¹ng cháº¿ Ä‘á»™ Local (khÃ´ng cáº§n Report Server)
                reportViewer.ProcessingMode        = ProcessingMode.Local;
                reportViewer.LocalReport.ReportEmbeddedResource = RDLC_NAME;

                // 4. GÃ¡n DataSource â€“ tÃªn pháº£i khá»›p vá»›i DataSet name trong RDLC
                var dataSource = new ReportDataSource(DATASET_NAME, reportData);
                reportViewer.LocalReport.DataSources.Clear();
                reportViewer.LocalReport.DataSources.Add(dataSource);

                // 5. Truyá»n Parameters vÃ o RDLC
                //    pReporter  â†’ NgÆ°á»i xuáº¥t bÃ¡o cÃ¡o (láº¥y tá»« AppSession)
                //    pExportDate â†’ NgÃ y xuáº¥t (DateTime.Now, format vi-VN)
                var parameters = new ReportParameter[]
                {
                    new ReportParameter(
                        "pReporter",
                        AppSession.FullName
                    ),
                    new ReportParameter(
                        "pExportDate",
                        DateTime.Now.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm", System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
                    )
                };
                reportViewer.LocalReport.SetParameters(parameters);

                // 6. Refresh â€“ trigger render RDLC thÃ nh ná»™i dung hiá»ƒn thá»‹
                reportViewer.RefreshReport();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                // VÃ²ng láº·p nÃ y sáº½ Ä‘Ã o táº­n gá»‘c rá»… táº¥t cáº£ cÃ¡c InnerException Ä‘ang bá»‹ giáº¥u
                string errorDetails = "";
                Exception? currentEx = ex;
                while (currentEx != null)
                {
                    errorDetails += "ðŸ‘‰ " + currentEx.Message + "\n\n";
                    currentEx = currentEx.InnerException;
                }

                lblStatus.Text = "âŒ Lá»—i Ä‘á»‹nh nghÄ©a bÃ¡o cÃ¡o (xem popup)";
                MessageBox.Show(
                    $"ToÃ n bá»™ chuá»—i lá»—i:\n\n{errorDetails}",
                    "Khui Lá»—i BÃ¡o CÃ¡o",
                    MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                    MessageBoxIcon.Error
                );
            }
            finally
            {
                // 7. KhÃ´i phá»¥c con trá» chuá»™t dÃ¹ thÃ nh cÃ´ng hay lá»—i
                this.Cursor = Cursors.Default;
            }
        }
    }
}
